chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1578 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 6674/23 3.For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Adnan Arshad Jatoi, SPP, NAB a/w Sheraz Farooq, Deputy Director, NAB, Sukkur. **** Learned SPP, NAB along with the officer in attendance submits that the plea bargain application was not accepted by the NAB authorities; however, he undertakes that the plea bargain amount will be returned to the petitioner within 15 days. On such statement, this petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
